name: Blanchette Park
description: Come play pickleball at Blanchette Park in Saint Charles, MO! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights.
open_play_schedule: Park Hours: Daylight - 12 Am (april 1 - Nov. 14), Daylight - 10 Pm (nov. 15 - March 31)

name: Vetta Sports Gametime
description:
Vetta Sports Gametime offers leagues, organized open play, beginner, intermediate and advanced clinics.  There are also plenty of opportunities for short term and long term court rentals, tournaments and social events.  

The courts are in excellent condition, the staff is friendly and knowledgable and the overall facility vibe is fun and social.  Great place to play. 

Additional highlights:

- 6 New Premium Dedicated Pickleball Courts with Professional Netting
- First Indoor Dedicated Pickleball Facility in St. Peters
- Adding 6 More Dedicated Professional Courts in 2025
- Comfortable Seating and Social Spaces.
- Climate Controlled
- Outstanding Lighting
- Excellent Ceiling Height 
- Full Bar and Concession Operation
open_play_schedule: Schedule through Vetta Racquet Sports app
